💡 What to speak about
  • Your professional background and how you approach your work
  • A challenge you navigated recently and how you handled it
  • What motivates you and how you communicate under pressure
  • Your ideal working style and what collaboration means to you
🎯 Recording tips
  • Speak in a quiet environment for best accuracy
  • Aim for at least 30 seconds of natural speech
  • Speak at a natural pace — no need to slow down or over-enunciate
  • Be genuine — authentic speech gives the most accurate results

Click to upload or drag & drop
MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG — up to 50MB
🎵 audio_sample.mp3 selected
Drag and drop your audio file, or click the zone above to browse.
📁 Supported formats
.mp3
.wav
.m4a
.ogg
Maximum file size: 50MB · Minimum length: 15 seconds
💡 Best results
  • Use a recording of yourself speaking naturally (not singing or reading robotically)
  • Clear audio with minimal background noise gives higher accuracy
  • 30–90 seconds is the ideal length for personality analysis
  • Recordings from meetings, presentations, or voice memos all work well
🔒 Privacy

Your audio is processed locally on our server and is not stored beyond the analysis session. Only the extracted personality scores and transcript are saved to your profile.

🛡️ Neuroticism (Emotional Stability)

Consistent breath control and minimal vocal tremors indicate strong emotional regulation and resilience under pressure.
📋 Profession Insight · Your Profession
How your profile maps to professional communication
Complete a voice analysis session to unlock personalised profession-specific insights tailored to your Big Five personality profile.

Improvement Tips

🌬️
Diaphragmatic Breathing
Practice 4-7-8 breathing daily: inhale 4s, hold 7s, exhale 8s. This deepens vocal resonance and reduces nervous energy in your voice.
🎵
Vocal Warm-ups
Hum scales for 5 mins before speaking. Use lip trills to release tension. Try the "sirening" technique to expand your dynamic range.
⏸️
Strategic Pausing
Pause 1–2 seconds before key points. Silence signals confidence. Record yourself reading aloud and mark where pauses feel natural.
📐
Speech Structuring
Use the "PEEL" method: Point, Evidence, Explain, Link. This boosts Conscientiousness signals in your speech pattern.
🧘
Mindful Speaking
Practice slow, intentional speech for 10 mins daily. Read poetry aloud, focusing on emotion — this enhances your already high Openness.
💪
Projection Exercises
Speak to the back wall of a room without shouting. This builds Extraversion confidence and helps you own the room without forcing it.
💬
Want deeper, personalised guidance?

Your SoulSpeak AI Coach has full knowledge of your personality profile, profession, and session history. Ask anything about your scores, get role-specific communication tips, or request a personalised improvement plan — your AI Coach is built just for you.
